  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Electrical Engineer",
  "description": "Konvert Talent Global Concept is a full-fledged Human Resource Solutions Provider, incorporated in 2021 with its Head Office in Ogun State, Nigeria. We specialize in delivering practical, reliable, and scalable HR solutions that support organizational growth and operational efficiency.

At Konvert Talent Global Concept, we pride ourselves on professionalism, integrity, and responsiveness. We serve as a trusted HR partner to organizations across various sectors, helping them optimize workforce performance while remaining compliant with regulatory and best-practice standards.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Electrical Engineer

Job Location:&nbsp;Mowe / Ibafo - Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a skilled and proactive Electrical Engineer to oversee the installation, maintenance, and troubleshooting of electrical systems and equipment.
	The successful candidate will ensure efficient operations, compliance with safety standards, and support continuous improvement of electrical processes.


Key Responsibilities


	Install, maintain, and troubleshoot electrical systems and equipment.
	Perform routine inspections and preventive maintenance.
	Identify and resolve electrical faults to minimize downtime.
	Ensure compliance with electrical safety standards and regulations.
	Support installation and commissioning of new electrical equipment.
	Maintain accurate records of maintenance activities.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Electrical Engineering or related field.
	5&ndash;7years of relevant experience, preferably in an industrial environment.
	Strong knowledge of electrical systems and troubleshooting.
	Ability to read and interpret electrical drawings.
	Good analytical and problem-solving skills.


What we offer


	Competitive Salary.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;konverttalent@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Electrical Engineer Job at Konvert Talent Global Concept




        
    

        
        Konvert Talent Global Concept is a full-fledged Human Resource Solutions Provider, incorporated in 2021 with its Head Office in Ogun State, Nigeria. We specialize in delivering practical, reliable, and scalable HR solutions that support organizational growth and operational efficiency.

At Konvert Talent Global Concept, we pride ourselves on professionalism, integrity, and responsiveness. We serve as a trusted HR partner to organizations across various sectors, helping them optimize workforce performance while remaining compliant with regulatory and best-practice standards.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Electrical Engineer
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Mowe / Ibafo - Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a skilled and proactive Electrical Engineer to oversee the installation, maintenance, and troubleshooting of electrical systems and equipment.
	The successful candidate will ensure efficient operations, compliance with safety standards, and support continuous improvement of electrical processes.


Key Responsibilities


	Install, maintain, and troubleshoot electrical systems and equipment.
	Perform routine inspections and preventive maintenance.
	Identify and resolve electrical faults to minimize downtime.
	Ensure compliance with electrical safety standards and regulations.
	Support installation and commissioning of new electrical equipment.
	Maintain accurate records of maintenance activities.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engineering or related field.
	5–7years of relevant experience, preferably in an industrial environment.
	Strong knowledge of electrical systems and troubleshooting.
	Ability to read and interpret electrical drawings.
	Good analytical and problem-solving skills.


What we offer


	Competitive Salary.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Inventory / Account Officer",
  "description": "PrimePAO Limited is a workforce solutions and talent management company that specializes in recruitment, outsourcing, and brand support services for businesses across various industries. The company focuses on sourcing, training, and deploying skilled personnel who can effectively represent client brands and support operational needs.

PrimePAO provides staffing solutions for roles such as brand ambassadors, promotional staff, ushers, hostesses, models, field representatives, and other support personnel required for corporate projects, marketing activations, and business operations. The company has successfully executed large-scale recruitment and deployment projects, helping organizations quickly access qualified talent while maintaining professionalism and high service standards.

With a strong network of talent and a structured recruitment process, PrimePAO is committed to helping organizations build reliable teams while creating employment opportunities for qualified candidates.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Inventory / Account Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Mushin. Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a responsible and detail-oriented Inventory / Accounts Officer to manage inventory records, monitor stock movement, and support basic accounting and documentation processes.
	The successful candidate will help ensure accurate stock control, proper documentation of inventory transactions, and reconciliation between physical stock and financial records.


Key Responsibilities


	Maintain accurate inventory records and monitor stock levels regularly.
	Receive, inspect, and record incoming goods, ensuring quantities match purchase orders and delivery notes.
	Track stock movement and update inventory systems or spreadsheets accordingly.
	Conduct periodic stock counts and reconcile physical inventory with system records.
	Verify supplier invoices against purchase orders and delivery records.
	Prepare inventory and stock reports for management review.
	Identify and report damaged, expired, or obsolete items in the warehouse.
	Ensure proper storage and organization of inventory items for easy retrieval and control.
	Support basic accounting documentation related to inventory transactions.
	Inventory and accounting officers typically maintain stock records, track inventory movement, reconcile physical stock with system records, and prepare inventory reports to ensure accuracy and control of goods within an organization.


Requirements


	Minimum qualification of an OND or HND in Accounting, Business Administration, or a related field.
	At least 1 year of experience in inventory management, stock control, or accounting.
	Basic knowledge of inventory management and record keeping.
	Good numerical and analytical skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel or inventory management software is an added advantage.
	Strong attention to detail and organizational skills.
	Ability to work independently and maintain accurate records.


Salary
N85,000 Monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;info@primepao.com&nbsp;using &ldquo;Inventory / Accounts Officer&rdquo; as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-10",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Primepao"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",

      "@type": "PostalAddress",

Inventory / Account Officer Job at PrimePAO Limited




        
    

        
        PrimePAO Limited is a workforce solutions and talent management company that specializes in recruitment, outsourcing, and brand support services for businesses across various industries. The company focuses on sourcing, training, and deploying skilled personnel who can effectively represent client brands and support operational needs.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



PrimePAO provides staffing solutions for roles such as brand ambassadors, promotional staff, ushers, hostesses, models, field representatives, and other support personnel required for corporate projects, marketing activations, and business operations. The company has successfully executed large-scale recruitment and deployment projects, helping organizations quickly access qualified talent while maintaining professionalism and high service standards.

With a strong network of talent and a structured recruitment process, PrimePAO is committed to helping organizations build reliable teams while creating employment opportunities for qualified candidates.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Inventory / Account Officer

Job Location: Mushin. Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a responsible and detail-oriented Inventory / Accounts Officer to manage inventory records, monitor stock movement, and support basic accounting and documentation processes.
	The successful candidate will help ensure accurate stock control, proper documentation of inventory transactions, and reconciliation between physical stock and financial records.


Key Responsibilities


	Maintain accurate inventory records and monitor stock levels regularly.
	Receive, inspect, and record incoming goods, ensuring quantities match purchase orders and delivery notes.
	Track stock movement and update inventory systems or spreadsheets accordingly.
	Conduct periodic stock counts and reconcile physical inventory with system records.
	Verify supplier invoices against purchase orders and delivery records.
	Prepare inventory and stock reports for management review.
	Identify and report damaged, expired, or obsolete items in the warehouse.
	Ensure proper storage and organization of inventory items for easy retrieval and control.
	Support basic accounting documentation related to inventory transactions.
	Inventory and accounting officers typically maintain stock records, track inventory movement, reconcile physical stock with system records, and prepare inventory reports to ensure accuracy and control of goods within an organization.


Requirements


	Minimum qualification of an OND or HND in Accounting, Business Administration, or a related field.
	At least 1 year of experience in inventory management, stock control, or accounting.
	Basic knowledge of inventory management and record keeping.
	Good numerical and analytical skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel or inventory management software is an added advantage.
	Strong attention to detail and organizational skills.
	Ability to work independently and maintain accurate records.


Salary
N85,000 Monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Inventory / Accounts Officer” as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Female Real Estate Agent
Job Location:&nbsp;Victoria Island / Ikate Axis, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Overview


	We are seeking a dynamic and experienced Female Sales Executive to join our real estate team.
	The ideal candidate should have a strong background in sales, excellent communication skills, and the confidence to engage clients both physically and through digital platforms.
	This role involves property marketing, client engagement, and content creation, including appearing in short promotional property videos for marketing purposes.


Key Responsibilities


	Market and sell company property listings to prospective buyers and tenants
	Generate and manage qualified leads through networking and prospecting
	Conduct property inspections and client meetings
	Create and appear in property marketing videos for social media and digital campaigns
	Negotiate deals and close transactions
	Maintain accurate records of prospects and sales activities
	Build and maintain strong client relationships.


Requirements


	1 - 3 years of experience in sales (real estate experience is an advantage)
	Confident communicator with strong persuasion skills
	Comfortable appearing in video content for property marketing
	Strong networking and relationship-building ability
	Professional appearance and attitude
	Ability to work in a target-driven and field-based environment.
	Female candidates preferred, male can apply.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary Salary: N150,000 - N200,000 / month
	Attractive commission structure
	Training and development opportunities in real estate sales and marketing
	Exposure to high-value property transactions
	Supportive and growth-focused work environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Female Real Estate Agent
Job Location: Victoria Island / Ikate Axis, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Overview

	We are seeking a dynamic and experienced Female Sales Executive to join our real estate team.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "KYC and Onboarding Assistant",
  "description": "DAG Industries Nigeria Limited - We provide the most popular range of Bajaj motorcycles, Bajaj tricycles, Bajaj genuine spares, MRF tyres, DAG lubricants, and unfaltering after-sales service. Backed by its untiring team of professional and trained technicians, authorized service stations, and its own service center, DAG has been instrumental in developing Nigeria through building infrastructure and creating jobs, thereby providing a livelihood for the common people in Nigeria. We at DAG are committed to providing genuine spare parts, accessories, and a never failing support to our customers and business associates.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: KYC and Onboarding Assistant

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports To: Compliance Manager / KYC Supervisor

Job Summary


	The KYC and Onboarding Assistant is responsible for supporting the customer onboarding process by verifying customer identities, reviewing documentation, and ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements and company policies.
	The role involves conducting Know Your Customer (KYC) checks, maintaining accurate records, and assisting in preventing fraud, money laundering, and other financial crimes.


Key Responsibilities
Customer Onboarding:


	Assist in the onboarding of new customers by collecting and reviewing required documentation.
	Ensure customer information is accurately captured and recorded in the system.
	Verify customer identities and supporting documents in line with company policies and regulatory requirements.
	Ensure all onboarding procedures are completed before account activation.


KYC Verification:


	Conduct KYC checks to confirm customer identity and legitimacy.
	Review identification documents such as government-issued IDs, proof of address, and other required documents.
	Identify incomplete or suspicious applications and escalate to the Compliance team.


Compliance Support:


	Ensure adherence to KYC/AML policies and regulatory guidelines.
	Assist in monitoring customer accounts for compliance with internal policies.
	Report suspicious activities or discrepancies to the Compliance Manager.


Documentation and Record Keeping:


	Maintain accurate and organized records of customer documents and onboarding files.
	Ensure proper documentation for audit and regulatory purposes.
	Update customer information in the database when required.


Customer Support:


	Provide support to customers during the onboarding process.
	Respond to customer inquiries regarding documentation and onboarding requirements.
	Follow up with customers for missing or additional information.


&nbsp;&nbsp;Requirements
Qualifications:


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree or HND in Business Administration, Finance, Economics, Banking, or a related field.


Experience::


	1&ndash;3 years of experience in KYC, customer onboarding, compliance, or banking operations.
	Experience in financial services, fintech, microfinance, or banking is an added advantage.


Skills and Competencies:


	Good knowledge of KYC and AML regulations.
	Strong attention to detail and analytical skills.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to handle confidential information with integrity.
	Strong organizational and documentation skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;Kingsley.o@bajajnigeria.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-01",

  },

KYC and Onboarding Assistant Job at DAG Industries Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        DAG Industries Nigeria Limited - We provide the most popular range of Bajaj motorcycles, Bajaj tricycles, Bajaj genuine spares, MRF tyres, DAG lubricants, and unfaltering after-sales service. Backed by its untiring team of professional and trained technicians, authorized service stations, and its own service center, DAG has been instrumental in developing Nigeria through building infrastructure and creating jobs, thereby providing a livelihood for the common people in Nigeria. We at DAG are committed to providing genuine spare parts, accessories, and a never failing support to our customers and business associates.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: KYC and Onboarding Assistant
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports To: Compliance Manager / KYC Supervisor

Job Summary


	The KYC and Onboarding Assistant is responsible for supporting the customer onboarding process by verifying customer identities, reviewing documentation, and ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements and company policies.
	The role involves conducting Know Your Customer (KYC) checks, maintaining accurate records, and assisting in preventing fraud, money laundering, and other financial crimes.


Key Responsibilities
Customer Onboarding:


	Assist in the onboarding of new customers by collecting and reviewing required documentation.
	Ensure customer information is accurately captured and recorded in the system.
	Verify customer identities and supporting documents in line with company policies and regulatory requirements.
	Ensure all onboarding procedures are completed before account activation.


KYC Verification:


	Conduct KYC checks to confirm customer identity and legitimacy.
	Review identification documents such as government-issued IDs, proof of address, and other required documents.
	Identify incomplete or suspicious applications and escalate to the Compliance team.


Compliance Support:


	Ensure adherence to KYC/AML policies and regulatory guidelines.
	Assist in monitoring customer accounts for compliance with internal policies.
	Report suspicious activities or discrepancies to the Compliance Manager.


Documentation and Record Keeping:


	Maintain accurate and organized records of customer documents and onboarding files.
	Ensure proper documentation for audit and regulatory purposes.
	Update customer information in the database when required.


Customer Support:


	Provide support to customers during the onboarding process.
	Respond to customer inquiries regarding documentation and onboarding requirements.
	Follow up with customers for missing or additional information.


  Requirements
Qualifications:


	Bachelor’s degree or HND in Business Administration, Finance, Economics, Banking, or a related field.


Experience::


	1–3 years of experience in KYC, customer onboarding, compliance, or banking operations.
	Experience in financial services, fintech, microfinance, or banking is an added advantage.


Skills and Competencies:


	Good knowledge of KYC and AML regulations.
	Strong attention to detail and analytical skills.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to handle confidential information with integrity.
	Strong organizational and documentation skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
